# 🎯 Task 02.4: Deduplication

## 📅 Sprint Info
- **Duration:** 4 days
- **Milestone:** M1 - Core Retrieval
- **Priority:** P1 (Important)
- **Depends On:** Task 02.3 (Index Builder) ✅
- **Blocks:** Task 02.5 (Quality Gate)
- **Assignee:** TBD

## 🎬 What You'll Build
Cross-language deduplication using URL-level matching and content-based simhash/shingles. Reduces near-duplicates by ≥60%. Includes canonical URL selection — deciding which URL to keep as the authoritative version when duplicates are found.

## 📋 Daily Breakdown

### Day 1: URL Normalization & Canonical Selection
- [ ] URL canonicalization (http/https, www, trailing slash, query param sorting)
- [ ] URL deduplication database
- [ ] **Canonical URL selection strategy** (critical — must determine which URL to keep):
  - Prefer HTTPS over HTTP for same content
  - Prefer shorter URL (fewer query parameters)
  - Prefer URL without session IDs or tracking params (`utm_`, `fbclid`, etc.)
  - Prefer URL that is explicitly declared as canonical via `<link rel="canonical">`
  - Prefer URL from higher-authority domain when cross-domain duplicate found
  - Store canonical URL in index; redirect all duplicate URLs to canonical
- [ ] Test with duplicate URLs across all above cases

### Day 2: Content-Based Dedup (Simhash)
- [ ] Implement simhash algorithm
- [ ] Generate document fingerprints
- [ ] Hamming distance calculation
- [ ] Near-duplicate detection

### Day 3: Shingles & Integration
- [ ] Implement shingling algorithm
- [ ] Combine simhash + shingles
- [ ] Integration with index builder
- [ ] Test with real duplicates

### Day 4: Performance & Testing
- [ ] Optimize for scale (100M docs)
- [ ] Batch deduplication pipeline
- [ ] Comprehensive tests
- [ ] Impact measurement

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] URL-level dedup: 100% accuracy
- [ ] Content dedup: ≥90% precision, ≥85% recall
- [ ] Reduces near-duplicates by ≥60%
- [ ] Works across languages
- [ ] Processing: 10K+ docs/sec
- [ ] Canonical URL correctly selected when multiple URL forms exist for same content
- [ ] `<link rel="canonical">` declaration respected and used as canonical when present
- [ ] Cross-domain duplicates: higher-authority domain's URL selected as canonical
- [ ] Tracking parameters (utm_, fbclid, sessionid) stripped before canonical comparison

## 🎉 Celebration Criteria
✅ **Demo:** Show duplicate detection in action  
✅ **Impact:** 60%+ duplicate reduction  

**🎊 Celebration:** Clean, unique results!

## 📦 Deliverables
- `src/search/Deduplicator.cpp` (250 lines)
- `src/search/Simhash.cpp` (150 lines)
- `tests/dedup_test.cpp` (100+ cases)
